title: Youtube Poop: The Evil King Part 2
description:
It took me a LONG time to finish this video sorry about that.

Just if someone wonder yes i took some sound effect and idea from the video called Youtube Poop: Final Spaghetti.

Anyway enjoy Part 2.

(For a moment during the video The Evil King HP Bug for about 10 sec sorry about that nothing perfect i guess...)
______________________________________
The Song List.

1: FIGHT!! Ver.4 ~ The Final Battle (Grandia 2)

2: Battle Theme (Lost Odyssey) "Not sure about this one"

3:  Roar of the Departed Souls (Lost Odyssey)

4: Battle with Magus (Chrono trigger)

5: Those Chosen by the Planet (Final Fantasy 7)
______________________________________

Know the game MyBrute? It can be a fun little game where you make a character and have him fight in a arena VS other people character it is free and very simple to play with.

I'm looking for pupils! Yes, if you are interested in becoming my pupils on Mybrute well just go on this link make a character and start to fight in the arena. ^^

Here the link

http://dontmoveanddiiie.mybrute.com
